headline.zh: 专注机器人控制、通信系统、计算机视觉与游戏原型的工程作品集。
headline.en: Engineering portfolio focused on robotics control, communication systems, computer vision, and game prototypes.

summary.zh: 我关注能运行、能验证、能继续扩展的工程原型，方向包括机器人、AI、信号处理和交互系统。项目通常围绕安全检查、数据流、仿真、界面和可部署演示展开。
summary.en: I build practical prototypes across robotics, AI, signal processing, and interactive systems. My work usually combines software engineering with applied engineering constraints: safety checks, data flow, simulation, interfaces, and deployable demos.

degree.zh: 本科阶段课程与项目实践

details.zh: 关注机器人、信号处理、计算机视觉、控制流程和软件原型开发。
details.en: Focus areas include robotics, signal processing, computer vision, embedded-style control workflows, and software prototyping.

interests.zh: 游戏系统与工具化 UI
